message:
test(core): expand protocol(+109), store(+150), sandbox(+125), raptorq(+106) tests

fcp-protocol: 469→578 tests across 5 files. Control plane retention,
symbol envelope context binding, FCPC header/replay, FCPS symbol
records/ack/request, session crypto/replay/MAC.

fcp-store: 513→663 tests across 8 files. Coverage evaluation, error
source chains, object store quota, quarantine admission, repair
controller budget/planning, symbol store metadata, offline summary,
GC roots pin/unpin.

fcp-sandbox: 532→657 tests across 4 files. Sandbox policy/platform,
egress IDN/unicode/IPv6/SSRF, WASI error variants/deterministic RNG/
LEB128/fuel, macOS SBPL sanitization/profile generation.

fcp-raptorq: 557→663 tests across 8 files. Error boundaries, config
preset serde, decoder admission/memory, envelope AAD sensitivity,
GF(256) algebra, chunk content ID, encoder ESI/symbol, OTI roundtrips.

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
